Command.description: Teleport to the [ff6a02]Community Horde Base[-] in the Pine Forest

OnUnauthorized.Action: Complete the [ff6a02]Find Stronghold[-] quest to unlock this teleport. Read the map you received on first spawn to start the quest.

Command.description: Teleport to their bedroll, if set.

OnUnauthorized.Action: Complete the [ff6a02]Unlock Fast Travel: Bed[-] challenge to unlock this teleport. You can find this challenge in the Stronghold challenges tab.
